title: ACID SPLASH
subtitle: Evocation Cantrip
front_body: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one creature within range, or choose two creatures within range that are within 5 feet of each other. A target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 Acid damage.
back_body: At Higher Levels: The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6).

title: CHILL TOUCH
subtitle: Necromancy Cantrip
front_body: You channel necrotic energy to disrupt the life force of one creature you touch. Make a melee spell attack against the creature. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Necrotic damage, and it can't regain Hit Points until the start of your next turn. If you hit an Undead target, it also has Disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.
back_body: At Higher Levels: The damage increases by 1d10 when you reach levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).

title: DANCING LIGHTS
subtitle: Evocation Cantrip
front_body: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that hover in the air for the duration (Concentration, up to 1 minute). You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely humanoid form.
back_body:
Materials: A bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm.

As a Bonus Action, you can move the lights up to 60 feet. A light must be within 20 feet of another light created by this spell, and a light winks out if it exceeds the spell's range.

title: ELDRITCH BLAST
subtitle: Evocation Cantrip
front_body: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Force damage.
back_body: At Higher Levels: The spell creates more than one beam when you reach higher levels: two beams at level 5, three beams at level 11, and four beams at level 17. You can direct the beams at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each beam.

title: SORCEROUS BURST
subtitle: Evocation Cantrip
front_body: You cast a burst of sorcerous energy at one creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 damage. Choose Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Poison, or Thunder for the damage type.
back_body:
If you roll an 8 on a d8 for this spell's damage, you can roll another d8 and add it to the damage. You can do this continuously if you keep rolling an 8.

At Higher Levels: Damage increases by 1d8 at levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8).

title: STARRY WISP
subtitle: Evocation Cantrip
front_body: You launch a wisp of starlight at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Radiant damage, and until the end of your next turn, it emits dim light in a 10-foot radius and can't benefit from the Invisible condition.
back_body: At Higher Levels: Damage increases by 1d8 at levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8).

title: ELEMENTALISM
subtitle: Transmutation Cantrip
front_body:
You exert control over the elements, creating one of the following effects:
- Create a breeze that flutters clothing.
- Light or snuff a candle or torch.
- Clean up to 1 cubic foot of dirt.
- Chill or warm 1 pound of nonmagical material for 1 hour.
- Create a shower of sparks or a puff of wind.
back_body: This is a minor magical trick that cannot cause damage or affect an unwilling creature.
